# GMI Q2 2026 Production Handoff

## Generated files

- `global-market-intelligence-report-q2-2026.production.mdx`
- `global-market-intelligence-report-q2-2026.production.md`

## Production status

This package is formatted as a production release candidate for the GMI Q2 2026 report.

## Critical lock items before public/paid release

1. Keep the report restricted until final data lock.
2. Re-check non-public terminal/market data values:
   - DXY volatility range
   - US 10-year yield Q2 range
   - HY spreads
   - IIF Q2 EM capital flows
   - India FDI preliminary figure
   - Tariff effective-rate tracker values
3. Keep all scenario probabilities labelled as assumptions, not forecasts.
4. Keep all advice disclaimers.
5. Do not present the report as investment advice.
6. Do not mark final `PUBLISHED` until the actual publication date or owner approval.

## Changes applied from uploaded draft

- Converted to production MDX with frontmatter.
- Added canonical product metadata.
- Added report cover shell.
- Changed publication state to production release candidate.
- Corrected IMF April 2026 global growth reference from 3.2% to 3.1%.
- Corrected May 2026 US CPI headline from 3.4% to 4.2%.
- Preserved the falsification register, call review, scenario matrix, confidence inventory, and board-level actions.
